title: Manufacturing Engineer - Jindal Steel & Power - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Jindal Steel & Power - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Jindal Steel & Power in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Jindal Steel & Power:
Jindal Steel & Power is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jindal Steel & Power!
